STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY TAN, HELEN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, WILLIAM $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,625.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN
